message:
fix(fp-columnar): preserve int64 for mod/floordiv when no zero divisors

Pandas preserves int64 dtype for int % int and int // int operations,
only promoting to float64 when there's a zero divisor (to represent
NaN/inf). The previous implementation always promoted to float64.

- Update vectorized_binary_i64 to handle Mod/FloorDiv for int operands
- Add zero-divisor check that falls back to float path when needed
- Update binary_numeric dtype logic to match pandas behavior
- Add comprehensive tests for both normal and zero-divisor cases

Closes: frankenpandas-urx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
